basis: POPULATION (owner-ruled): r_pop(a)=Sum realized_next / Sum v per age-transition over the committed -2/-1/now boards, INCLUDING exiters realized residual (off-board=0, busts full weight R107.3); den-weighted 3pt MA + PAVA non-increasing a>=24 (rule 7).
